title: Automatically add an update for each new project
excerpt: I am looking to find out if theres anyway to have new projects automatically come with an initial update. I would like to add a checklist update to every new project that my team will click off. While I can do this in su…

posts.author: zkendall (Zack Kendall)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking to find out if theres anyway to have new projects automatically come with an initial update. I would like to add a checklist update to every new project that my team will click off. While I can do this in sub-items, I am trying to use sub-items for assignable tasks whereas this would just be a check list for them to click off. Anyway to do this?

posts.author: samanthal (Samantha Lim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @zkendall!

Thanks for your post in our community, and so sorry for the delay!

We wanted to follow up and see if you still had any questions on getting your board set up, and if so, please send us an email to support@monday.com. One of our product experts are available 24/7 to help!
